title: ERP Verdict
description: Structured output produced by the finops_agent skill after validating a project's ERP financial setup.

project_key.description: Unique project identifier. Must match the key in state.json.

verdict.description: The outcome of the ERP financial setup validation.

checked_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the ERP check was performed.

checked_by.description: Identifier of the agent or human user that performed the check (e.g., 'finops_agent', 'tpanigrahy').

notes.description: Plain English explanation of the verdict. Must name specific ERP fields that passed or failed. Must not be generic.

examples.notes: Cost center CC-4821 is active. PO#PO-2026-0041 is valid through 2026-12-31. Cost owner mapped to tpanigrahy@company.com.
Cost center CC-4821 found but no active purchase order is linked. PO mapping is required before cloud spend can be approved.
